title: hieracium maculatum subsp. pinnatisectum
intro: Hieracium maculatum subsp. pinnatisectum, also known as spotted hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium maculatum subsp. pinnatisectum include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its ability to support digestive health. Herbal preparations of Hieracium maculatum subsp. pinnatisectum often include teas, infusions, and tinctures made from the plant's leaves and flowers.
